title: FILING DEADLINE--Kuznicki Law PLLC Announces Class Action on Behalf of Shareholders of PayPal Holdings, Inc. - PYPL

title: PayPal Class Action: Levi & Korsinsky Reminds PayPal Holdings, Inc. Investors of the Pending Class Action Lawsuit with a Lead Plaintiff Deadline of December 5, 2022 - PYPL
text: New York, New York--(Newsfile Corp. - November 30, 2022) - Levi & Korsinsky, LLP notifies investors in PayPal Holdings, Inc. ("PayPal" or the "Company") (NASDAQ: PYPL) of a class action securities lawsuit.The lawsuit on behalf of PayPal investors has been commenced in the the United States District Court for the District of New Jersey.

title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: The Gross Law Firm Notifies Shareholders of PayPal Holdings, Inc. of a Class Action Lawsuit and a Lead Plaintiff Deadline of December 5, 2022 - (NASDAQ: PYPL)
text: NEW YORK , Nov. 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Gross Law Firm issues the following notice to shareholders of PayPal Holdings, Inc.. Shareholders who purchased shares of PYPL during the class period listed are encouraged to contact the firm regarding possible lead plaintiff appointment.

title: PYPL ALERT: The Klein Law Firm Announces a Lead Plaintiff Deadline of December 5, 2022 in the Class Action Filed on Behalf of PayPal Holdings, Inc. Shareholders
text: NEW YORK , Nov. 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Klein Law Firm announces that a class action complaint has been filed on behalf of shareholders of PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) alleging that the Company violated federal securities laws. This lawsuit is on behalf of all persons or entities who purchased PayPal common stock between February 3, 2021, and February 1, 2022, inclusive.Lead Plaintiff Deadline: December 5, 2022 No obligation or cost to you.
